policy_description: This step writes small pilot sample preparation smoke outputs.
Ignored raw CIF/mmCIF read is allowed in this step.
struct_conn and atom_site parsing are allowed in this step.
Atom tables are smoke outputs, not training samples.
No split or leakage matrix is written.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split gate remains required before training.
The canonical five mask tasks are preserved.
Execution smoke outputs must not be used for training.
